summary: Comprehensive testing of Lapopo auction platform completed successfully. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI responsive and interactive, authentication and bidding flows working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend API - All 17 endpoints tested (100% success rate)
✅ Authentication - Login/register with demo credentials working
✅ Auction listing - 12+ seed auctions displayed correctly
✅ Search functionality - iPhone search returns relevant results
✅ Quick filters - All 5 filters (Terminan pronto, Desde 1€, Solo Canarias, Electrónica, Hogar) working
✅ Auction detail page - Title, price, countdown, description, bid history displayed
✅ Bidding system - Successfully placed bids with proper validation
✅ Auction creation - Multi-step wizard navigation working
✅ Profile management - Name editing functionality working
✅ Mobile responsiveness - All features work on mobile viewport (390x844)
✅ Header navigation - All links and user menu functional
✅ Solo Canarias section - Displays only Canary Islands auctions
✅ Spanish UI - All text properly localized
✅ Mobile bottom navigation visible on mobile viewport
✅ Categories and locations endpoints working (8 categories, 17 locations)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major UI flows working, minor areas need photo upload validation)
